about: Interleaved threads, a genuine detour that must surface as emergent, a glance that must stay ambient.

steps.text: PLite: tuning the thread map layout, blockers need more visual weight.
Phossil: issue triage for the capture runtime, three open reports.
Detour: MacBook speaker crackling at low volume. Genius Bar or third-party repair? Check AppleCare status first, then repair cost estimates.
Speaker repair notes: out of warranty likely, estimate range 150 to 300.
